title: Proclamation No. 578, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 578

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL PURPOSES TWO PARCELS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE CITY OF CEBU, ISLAND OF CEBU

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for school purposes, under the administration of the Director of Education, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the City of Cebu, island of Cebu, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psu-50553 (Swo-16380), to wit:

Lot No. 2. — Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-50553, N. 19° 55′ E. 961.00 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Cebu, thence N. 13° 51′ E. 11.45 m. to point 2; S. 61° 29′ E. 8.00 m. to point 3; N. 10° 40′ E. 29.11 m. to point 4; N. 30° – 26’ W. 16.21 m . to point 5; S. 86° 37′ E. 102.26 m. to point 6; S. 8° 30′ W. 63.88 m. to point 7; N. 84° 07′ W. 100.82 m. to point 8; N. 4° 24′ E. 9.02 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 0.5930 hectare.

Points 5 and 8, intersections; and the rest are old P. L. S. cylindrical concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north, by public land; on the east by Cebu Harbor; on the south, by Estero Zapatera; and on the west, by lots No2. 3, 1 and 4.

Lot No. 4. — Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-50553, N. 20° 02’ E. 999.92 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 1, municipality of Cebu, thence N. 63° 43′ W. 34.61 m. to point 2 ; S. 86° 37′ E. 22.86° m. to point 3; S. 30° 26′ E. 16.21 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 0.0154 hectare.

Point 3. intersection; and the rest are old P. L. S. cylindrical concrete monuments.

Bounded on the north, by public land; on the east, by lot No. 2; and on the southwest, by lot No. 1.

Bearings true. Declination 1° 38′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Psu-50553 (Swo-16380),

Surveyed: December 22, 1924.

Approved: November 15, 1926.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eighth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
